<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1, viewport-fit=cover">
<title data-cms="cms-150">Northline — Websites engineered for businesses that ship</title>
<meta name="description" content="Northline is a web design and engineering studio. We design, build, and ship high-performance websites for ambitious businesses." data-cms="cms-151">
<meta name="theme-color" content="#ffffff">

<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin="">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Geist:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Geist+Mono:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>
:root{
  --bg: #ffffff;
  --bg-soft: #fafafa;
  --bg-tint: #f5f5f5;
  --ink: #171717;
  --ink-2: #4d4d4d;
  --ink-3: #666666;
  --ink-4: #808080;
  --ink-5: #a3a3a3;
  --line: #ebebeb;
  --line-soft: rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
  --ring: rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
  --ring-strong: rgba(0,0,0,0.16);

  --develop: #0a72ef;
  --preview: #de1d8d;
  --ship: #ff5b4f;
  --link: #0072f5;
  --focus: hsla(212,100%,48%,1);

  --badge-bg: #ebf5ff;
  --badge-fg: #0068d6;

  --shadow-border: 0 0 0 1px var(--ring);
  --shadow-card: 0 0 0 1px var(--ring), 0 2px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04), 0 8px 8px -8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04), inset 0 0 0 1px #fafafa;
  --shadow-card-hover: 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.12), 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.04), 0 16px 24px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.10), inset 0 0 0 1px #fafafa;

  --radius-2: 4px;
  --radius-3: 6px;
  --radius-4: 8px;
  --radius-5: 12px;
  --radius-6: 16px;
  --radius-pill: 9999px;

  --container: 1200px;
  --gutter: 24px;
}

*{box-sizing:border-box}
html,body{margin:0;padding:0}
html{-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%;text-size-adjust:100%}
body{
  font-family:"Geist", Arial, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol";
  font-feature-settings:"liga" 1, "calt" 1;
  background:var(--bg);
  color:var(--ink);
  -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale;
  font-size:16px;
  line-height:1.5;
}
::selection{background:#171717;color:#fafafa}
img,svg{display:block;max-width:100%}
a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none}
button{font:inherit;color:inherit;background:none;border:0;cursor:pointer}
:focus-visible{outline:2px solid var(--focus);outline-offset:2px;border-radius:4px}

/* ────────── Layout primitives ────────── */
.container{max-width:var(--container);margin:0 auto;padding:0 var(--gutter)}
.section{padding:120px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--line)}
.section--tight{padding:88px 0}
.section--flush{padding:0}
.section--dark{background:#0a0a0a;color:#ededed;border-color:#1a1a1a}
.eyebrow{
  font-family:"Geist Mono", ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace;
  font-size:12px;
  font-weight:500;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  letter-spacing:0.06em;
  color:var(--ink-3);
}
.section--dark .eyebrow{color:#9a9a9a}

/* ────────── Type ────────── */
h1,h2,h3,h4{margin:0;font-weight:600}
h1{font-size:8.2rem;line-height:0.9;letter-spacing:-0.01em}
h2{font-size:4.6rem;line-height:0.98;letter-spacing:0}
h3{font-size:clamp(22px,2.4vw,32px);line-height:1.15;letter-spacing:-0.025em}
h4{font-size:20px;line-height:1.3;letter-spacing:-0.015em}
p{margin:0;color:var(--ink-2)}
.lead{font-size:clamp(18px,1.55vw,22px);line-height:1.55;color:var(--ink-2);max-width:62ch}
.section--dark .lead{color:#a3a3a3}
.mono{font-family:"Geist Mono",ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace}
@media (max-width:980px){
  h1{font-size:5.6rem}
  h2{font-size:3.3rem}
}
@media (max-width:640px){
  h1{font-size:3.6rem;line-height:0.96}
  h2{font-size:2.4rem;line-height:1.04}
}

/* ────────── Buttons ────────── */
.btn{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
  height:42px;padding:0 18px;
  border-radius:var(--radius-3);
  font-size:14px;font-weight:500;line-height:1;
  transition:background .15s ease, color .15s ease, box-shadow .15s ease, transform .15s ease;
  white-space:nowrap;
}
.btn--primary{background:var(--ink);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.06) inset}
.btn--primary:hover{background:#000}
.section--dark .btn--primary{background:#fff;color:#000}
.section--dark .btn--primary:hover{background:#ededed}

.btn--ghost{background:#fff;color:var(--ink);box-shadow:0 0 0 1px var(--line)}
.btn--ghost:hover{box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.18)}
.section--dark .btn--ghost{background:transparent;color:#fff;box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.18)}
.section--dark .btn--ghost:hover{box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.32)}

.btn--lg{height:50px;padding:0 24px;font-size:15px}

.arrow{display:inline-block;transition:transform .2s ease}
.btn:hover .arrow{transform:translateX(2px)}

/* ────────── Pill / badge ────────── */
.pill{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;
  height:28px;padding:0 12px;
  border-radius:var(--radius-pill);
  background:var(--badge-bg);color:var(--badge-fg);
  font-size:12px;font-weight:500;
  letter-spacing:-0.005em;
}
.pill--neutral{background:#fafafa;color:var(--ink-2);box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px var(--line)}
.pill--dark{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);color:#cdcdcd;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.10)}
.pill .dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:currentColor}

/* ────────── Nav ────────── */
.nav{
  position:sticky;top:0;z-index:50;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,0.78);
  backdrop-filter:saturate(180%) blur(14px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter:saturate(180%) blur(14px);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
}
.nav__row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:24px;height:64px}
.nav__brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:-0.025em;font-size:16px}
.nav__brand svg{width:22px;height:22px}
.nav__links{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-left:24px;flex:1}
.nav__link{
  padding:8px 12px;border-radius:var(--radius-3);
  font-size:14px;font-weight:500;color:var(--ink-2);
  transition:background .15s ease, color .15s ease;
}
.nav__link:hover{background:#f5f5f5;color:var(--ink)}
.nav__cta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
@media (max-width:820px){
  .nav__links{display:none}
}

/* ────────── Hero (white, single column) ────────── */
.hero{
  position:relative;
  overflow:clip;
  background:#fff;
  color:var(--ink);
}

.hero__pin{
  display:flex;
  flex-direction:column;
  padding:48px 0 80px;
  min-height:calc(100svh - 64px);
}
@supports not (height:100svh){ .hero__pin{min-height:calc(100vh - 64px)} }

.hero__stack{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-rows:auto 1fr;
  height:100%;
  gap:20px;
  align-items:start;
}

.hero__copy{
  text-align:center;
  max-width:980px;
  margin:0 auto;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0;
  width:100%;
}
.hero h1{
  font-size:clamp(44px,5.4vw,76px);
  line-height:0.95;
  letter-spacing:-0.045em;
  margin-top:18px;
  color:var(--ink);
}
.hero h1 em{
  font-style:normal;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,#0a72ef 0%,#de1d8d 55%,#ff5b4f 100%);
  -webkit-background-clip:text;background-clip:text;color:transparent;
}
.hero__subhead{
  font-size:clamp(18px,1.6vw,24px);
  line-height:1.3;
  letter-spacing:-0.018em;
  font-weight:500;
  color:var(--ink-2);
  margin-top:14px;
  max-width:48ch;
}
.hero .lead{
  font-size:clamp(15px,1.1vw,17px);
  margin-top:10px;
  max-width:54ch;
  text-align:center;
}
.hero__cta{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;gap:12px;margin-top:22px}

.hero__visual{
  position:relative;
  width:100%;
  min-height:0;
  display:flex;
  justify-content:center;
  align-items:center;
}
.hero__video-shell{
  position:relative;
  height:100%;
  max-height:100%;
  aspect-ratio:5/4;        /* show full laptop body */
  width:auto;
  max-width:min(78%, 760px);
  overflow:hidden;
  background:#fff;
}
.hero__video{
  width:100%;
  height:100%;
  display:block;
  object-fit:cover;
  /* keep full laptop visible, lifted slightly above centre */
  object-position:center 50%;
  background:#fff;
  /* lift source's off-white toward pure white + fade edges into the page */
  filter:brightness(1.05) contrast(1.02);
  -webkit-mask-image: radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 82% at center 48%, #000 60%, transparent 95%);
          mask-image: radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 82% at center 48%, #000 60%, transparent 95%);
}
.hero__progress{display:none}

@media (max-width:1080px){
  .hero__pin{padding:20px 0 24px}
  .hero h1{font-size:clamp(40px,7vw,60px)}
  .hero__video-shell{aspect-ratio:5/4}
}
@media (max-width:820px){
  .hero{min-height:auto}
  .hero__pin{position:relative;top:auto;height:auto;padding:40px 0 56px}
  .hero__stack{height:auto;gap:32px}
  .hero__visual{min-height:280px}
  .hero__video-shell{height:auto;width:100%;aspect-ratio:5/4}
}

/* ────────── Logo strip (black) ────────── */
.logos{
  background:#0a0a0a;color:#fff;
  padding:40px 0 48px;
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.logos::before{
  content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:
    radial-gradient(60% 100% at 50% 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.04), transparent 60%);
  pointer-events:none;
}
.logos__label{
  text-align:center;color:#a3a3a3;
  font-family:"Geist Mono",ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:13px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.10em;
  margin-bottom:32px;position:relative;
}
.logos__row{
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:32px;
  position:relative;flex-wrap:wrap;row-gap:40px;
}
.logos__row a{
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  flex:1 1 0;min-width:96px;
}
.logos__row img{
  width:auto;max-width:100%;height:40px;object-fit:contain;
  opacity:.65;
  filter:brightness(0) invert(1);
  transition:opacity .25s ease, filter .25s ease, transform .25s ease;
}
.logos__row a:hover img,
.logos__row a:focus-visible img,
.logos__row a:active img{
  opacity:1;
  filter:none;            /* reveal native brand colour */
  transform:translateY(-1px);
}
/* Brands whose native logo is black — keep them white on hover so they don't disappear on the dark band */
.logos__row a[data-dark]:hover img,
.logos__row a[data-dark]:focus-visible img,
.logos__row a[data-dark]:active img{
  filter:brightness(0) invert(1);
  opacity:1;
}
@media (max-width:1080px){
  .logos__row{flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;gap:32px 40px}
  .logos__row a{flex:0 0 calc(25% - 40px)}
}
@media (max-width:540px){
  .logos__row a{flex:0 0 calc(33.333% - 28px)}
  .logos__row{gap:24px 28px}
}

/* ────────── Workflow pipeline ────────── */
.pipeline{position:relative;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:24px;margin-top:56px}
.pipe{
  background:#fff;border-radius:var(--radius-5);padding:32px;
  box-shadow:var(--shadow-card);
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  transition:box-shadow .25s ease, transform .25s ease;
}
.pipe:hover{box-shadow:var(--shadow-card-hover);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.pipe__label{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
  font-family:"Geist Mono",ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:12px;font-weight:500;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;
  margin-bottom:20px;
}
.pipe__index{
  width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:6px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:11px;color:#fff;
}
.pipe--develop .pipe__label{color:var(--develop)} .pipe--develop .pipe__index{background:var(--develop)}
.pipe--preview .pipe__label{color:var(--preview)} .pipe--preview .pipe__index{background:var(--preview)}
.pipe--ship    .pipe__label{color:var(--ship)}    .pipe--ship    .pipe__index{background:var(--ship)}
.pipe h3{letter-spacing:-0.03em;margin-bottom:10px}
.pipe p{font-size:15px;line-height:1.55}
.pipe::after{
  content:"";position:absolute;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;height:3px;
}
.pipe--develop::after{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--develop),transparent)}
.pipe--preview::after{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--preview),transparent)}
.pipe--ship::after{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--ship),transparent)}
@media (max-width:820px){.pipeline{grid-template-columns:1fr}}

/* ────────── Services grid ────────── */
.grid{display:grid;gap:24px}
.grid--3{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}
.grid--4{grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)}
@media (max-width:1080px){.grid--3,.grid--4{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}
@media (max-width:640px){.grid--3,.grid--4{grid-template-columns:1fr}}

.svc{
  position:relative;background:#fff;border-radius:var(--radius-5);padding:32px;
  box-shadow:var(--shadow-card);
  transition:box-shadow .25s ease, transform .25s ease;
}
.svc:hover{box-shadow:var(--shadow-card-hover);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.svc__icon{
  width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:10px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  background:#fafafa;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px var(--line);
  color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:22px;
}
.svc--blue    .svc__icon{background:rgba(10,114,239,.10);color:#0a72ef;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(10,114,239,.18)}
.svc--purple  .svc__icon{background:rgba(121,40,202,.10);color:#7928ca;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(121,40,202,.18)}
.svc--pink    .svc__icon{background:rgba(222,29,141,.10);color:#de1d8d;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(222,29,141,.18)}
.svc--red     .svc__icon{background:rgba(255,91,79,.10); color:#ff5b4f;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,91,79,.18)}
.svc--cyan    .svc__icon{background:rgba(0,112,243,.10); color:#0070f3;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,112,243,.18)}
.svc--magenta .svc__icon{background:rgba(235,54,127,.10);color:#eb367f;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(235,54,127,.18)}
.svc h4{margin-bottom:8px;letter-spacing:-0.02em}
.svc p{font-size:15px;line-height:1.5;color:var(--ink-3)}

/* ────────── Section header ────────── */
.s-head{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px;max-width:820px}
.s-head h2{margin-top:4px}
.s-head + .grid, .s-head + .pipeline, .s-head + .work, .s-head + .stats, .s-head + .pricing, .s-head + .testimonials, .s-head + .faq{margin-top:56px}

/* ────────── Stats ────────── */
.stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:0;border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;background:#fff;box-shadow:var(--shadow-card)}
.stat{padding:56px 32px;border-right:1px solid var(--line);display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:18px;min-width:0}
.stat:last-child{border-right:0}
.stat__num{font-size:clamp(48px,5.6vw,80px);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:-0.05em;line-height:0.95;color:var(--ink);white-space:nowrap}
.stat__num em{font-style:normal;color:var(--ship)}
.stat__num .sub{font-size:.4em;color:var(--ink-4);font-weight:500;letter-spacing:-0.02em;margin-left:2px}
.stat__label{color:var(--ink-3);font-size:14px;letter-spacing:-0.005em}
@media (max-width:920px){.stats{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}.stat:nth-child(2){border-right:0}.stat:nth-child(1),.stat:nth-child(2){border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)}}
@media (max-width:520px){.stats{grid-template-columns:1fr}.stat{border-right:0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)}.stat:last-child{border-bottom:0}}

/* ────────── Featured work ────────── */
.work{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.4fr 1fr;gap:24px}
.work__main, .work__side{
  border-radius:var(--radius-6);overflow:hidden;
  box-shadow:var(--shadow-card);
  background:#fff;display:flex;flex-direction:column;
  transition:box-shadow .25s ease, transform .25s ease;
  min-height:380px;
}
.work__main:hover,.work__side:hover{box-shadow:var(--shadow-card-hover);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.work__art{
  flex:1;position:relative;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
  overflow:hidden;min-height:240px;
}
.work__art--a{background:radial-gradient(60% 80% at 30% 30%,#ff5b4f33,transparent 65%),radial-gradient(60% 80% at 80% 80%,#de1d8d33,transparent 60%),#0a0a0a}
.work__art--b{background:radial-gradient(50% 70% at 70% 30%,#0a72ef30,transparent 60%),#fafafa}
.work__art--c{background:linear-gradient(160deg,#fafafa,#ebebeb)}

/* realistic mini website mock */
.mock{
  position:absolute;left:32px;right:32px;bottom:0;
  height:78%;background:#fff;border-radius:10px 10px 0 0;
  box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.08), 0 -16px 36px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
  overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;
}
.mock--side{left:24px;right:24px;height:70%}
.mock__bar{height:30px;background:#fafafa;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:0 12px}
.mock__bar i{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;display:block}
.mock__bar i:nth-child(1){background:#ff5b4f}
.mock__bar i:nth-child(2){background:#ffbd2e}
.mock__bar i:nth-child(3){background:#27c93f}
.mock__bar .url{margin-left:10px;background:#fff;height:18px;width:60%;max-width:220px;border-radius:4px;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px var(--line)}
.mock__nav{height:36px;padding:0 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);background:#fff}
.mock__nav .logo{width:14px;height:14px;background:#171717;border-radius:3px;clip-path:polygon(50% 0,100% 100%,0 100%)}
.mock__nav .ln{height:7px;border-radius:3px;background:#ebebeb}
.mock__nav .ln.w-12{width:36px} .mock__nav .ln.w-10{width:28px} .mock__nav .ln.w-14{width:44px}
.mock__nav .cta{margin-left:auto;height:18px;width:60px;background:#171717;border-radius:4px}
.mock__hero{padding:18px 16px 14px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}
.mock__hero .h{height:13px;border-radius:4px;background:#171717}
.mock__hero .h.w-90{width:88%}
.mock__hero .h.w-70{width:68%}
.mock__hero .sub{height:7px;border-radius:3px;background:#cfcfcf;width:60%;margin-top:2px}
.mock__hero .ctas{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:6px}
.mock__hero .ctas span{height:18px;width:62px;border-radius:4px;background:#171717}
.mock__hero .ctas span:nth-child(2){background:#fff;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px var(--line)}
.mock__cards{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;padding:8px 16px 14px}
.mock__cards .c{height:46px;border-radius:6px;background:#fafafa;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px var(--line)}
.mock__cards .c--accent{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0a72ef22,#de1d8d22)}

.work__meta{padding:24px 28px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}
.work__cat{
  font-family:"Geist Mono",ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:11px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;color:var(--ink-3)
}
.work__title{font-size:18px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:-0.025em}
.work__copy{color:var(--ink-3);font-size:14px;line-height:1.5}
.work__side-grid{display:grid;grid-template-rows:1fr 1fr;gap:24px}
@media (max-width:920px){.work{grid-template-columns:1fr}.work__side-grid{grid-template-rows:auto;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}}
@media (max-width:600px){.work__side-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}

/* ────────── Pricing ────────── */
.pricing{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:24px;align-items:stretch}
@media (max-width:920px){.pricing{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.tier{
  position:relative;background:#fff;border-radius:var(--radius-5);
  padding:36px 32px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:18px;
  box-shadow:var(--shadow-card);
}
.tier--featured{
  background:#0a0a0a;color:#fff;
  box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.08), 0 24px 60px -20px rgba(10,114,239,0.30);
  transform:translateY(-8px);
}
.tier--featured .tier__price strong{color:#fff}

<section class="section" id="faq" aria-labelledby="faq-title" data-cms-item="col1">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="s-head">
      <span class="eyebrow" data-cms="cms-101">// FAQ</span>
      <h2 id="faq-title" data-cms="cms-102">Common questions.</h2>
    </div>

    <div class="faq" data-cms-collection="col10">
      <details data-cms-item="col10">
        <summary data-cms="cms-103">How long does a typical project take?<span class="plus" aria-hidden="true">+</span></summary>
        <div class="faq__a">Launchpad runs four weeks. A standard Studio engagement is six to eight weeks from kickoff to live deploy, and we publish a public Linear board so you can see exactly where every milestone sits.</div>
      </details>
      <details data-cms-item="col10">
        <summary data-cms="cms-104">Do you work with companies outside the UK?<span class="plus" aria-hidden="true">+</span></summary>
        <div class="faq__a">Yes. Roughly 60% of our clients are in the US and EU. We schedule one short overlap window each day and run async on Loom, Figma and Linear for everything else.</div>
      </details>
      <details data-cms-item="col10">
        <summary data-cms="cms-105">Can we keep editing the site after launch?<span class="plus" aria-hidden="true">+</span></summary>
        <div class="faq__a">Absolutely — that's the whole point. We hand over a CMS your marketing team can actually use, plus a 60-minute editor training session. Most Studio clients ship a new page within their first week.</div>
      </details>
      <details data-cms-item="col10">
        <summary data-cms="cms-106">What stack do you build on?<span class="plus" aria-hidden="true">+</span></summary>
        <div class="faq__a">For most marketing sites: Next.js, Tailwind, and a headless CMS (Sanity or Contentful), deployed on Vercel. Where speed-to-edit matters more than custom interactions, we build in Webflow.</div>
      </details>
      <details data-cms-item="col10">
        <summary data-cms="cms-107">Will we work directly with the people building the site?<span class="plus" aria-hidden="true">+</span></summary>
        <div class="faq__a">Always. There are no account managers at Northline. You get a dedicated designer, a dedicated engineer, and a project lead — and you talk to them in a shared Slack channel from day one.</div>
      </details>
      <details data-cms-item="col10">
        <summary data-cms="cms-108">What if we already have a brand we like?<span class="plus" aria-hidden="true">+</span></summary>
        <div class="faq__a">Even better. Roughly half of our projects start from an existing identity. We'll audit it for screen and code, fix the gaps, and turn it into a working design system.</div>
      </details>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
